meta.title: DAPAN GLOBAL — Cargo Shipping China to USA
meta.description: Reliable cargo delivery from China to the USA and product sourcing services by DAPAN GLOBAL LLC, Chicago.

hero.title: Cargo delivery and product sourcing, done right.
hero.subtitle: DAPAN GLOBAL ships freight from China to the United States by sea and air, and sources products directly from Chinese manufacturers — with transparent pricing and real support.

cargo.title: Cargo Delivery
cargo.description: Sea and air freight from China to the USA. Standard and fast lanes, general and sensitive cargo, transparent per-kg pricing.

sourcing.title: Product Sourcing
sourcing.description: We find manufacturers, negotiate pricing, inspect quality, and consolidate your order for shipping — so you don't have to be in China to buy from China.

calculator.title: Shipping cost calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate your cost by weight, dimensions, and shipping mode. Final price is confirmed after warehouse measurement.
calculator.surchargeCategory: Contains: oils, candles, perfume, medicine, or supplements
calculator.disclaimer: This is an estimate. Final price is confirmed after warehouse measurement.

tracking.title: Track your shipment
tracking.subtitle: Enter your tracking code to see the latest status.
tracking.invalidCode: Enter a valid tracking code (letters and numbers only).

trackingResult.title: Shipment {code}
trackingResult.notFound: No status found for this tracking code. Please check the code and try again.
trackingResult.error: We couldn't reach the tracking service right now.

rates.title: Shipping Rates
rates.subtitle: Per-kg pricing by weight tier. Sea minimum billable weight is 12 kg; air minimum is 5 kg.
rates.surchargeNote: +$0.38/kg surcharge applies to: essential oils, aromatherapy, candles, perfume, medicine, supplements, and F-goods.
rates.remoteZipNote: Remote ZIP codes incur a flat $15 fee per piece.
rates.claimsText: Freight refund plus $2.50/kg. After UPS/FedEx pickup, maximum $100 per piece.

quoteCargo.title: Cargo Delivery
quoteCargo.subtitle: Ship from China to the USA · door-to-door
quoteCargo.name: Full name
quoteCargo.success: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours.
quoteCargo.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

quoteSourcing.title: Sourcing Service
quoteSourcing.subtitle: Find products & suppliers in China
quoteSourcing.name: Full name
quoteSourcing.success: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours.
quoteSourcing.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

address.title: Get Your China Warehouse Address
address.subtitle: Get a personal receiving address at our Guangdong warehouse — paste it as your shipping address on Taobao, Pinduoduo, or any Chinese store, and we'll consolidate and forward everything to you in the USA.
address.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.
address.resultExisting: You already have a warehouse address on file — here it is again.
address.resultNew: Your personal warehouse address has been assigned and emailed to you.
address.guideStep1: Paste this exact address as your shipping address at checkout on Taobao, Pinduoduo, or any Chinese store.
address.guideStep2: Keep the ZWQ05 code and the phone number exactly as shown — the warehouse uses them to identify your parcels.
address.guideStep3: Once your package arrives at the warehouse, message us on WhatsApp so we can consolidate and ship it to you.

footer.tagline: Cargo delivery and product sourcing between China and the USA.

footer.license: Licensed and operating in Chicago, Illinois, USA.
